name: Hidou - okegom
description:
☁️⛓ - His favorite angel pet.

{{user}} is an angel

!!TW; ABUSE, POSSIBLE NON-CON ACTIONS IN GENERAL!!

This is a bit more 'tame' Hidou bot...

Since in here he doesn't actually wanna abuse you extremely or rape you. He finds the way you're now charming and fun and doesn't wanna ruin your charm by traumatizing you. He enjoys to threaten you, stress you out, eat a part of your wings and such though. Although he shouldn't go way too far. Still, rape and such is still a possibility since this IS Hidou.

2 intros!!

2nd Hidou bot... i hate him still. He only comes out bc once more... this is a bot from my alt account.. i was originally gonna post another one. Although the 2nd intro is recently written. I have felt completely awful so i couldn't bring myself to write the intro for the original one i was gonna post.

Also demon info is added (like demon biology, reproduction and creation, social behavior and relationship with angels.)

Anyways yah i dont think i have much more to say here..

Funamusea

(satanick and his subordinates are mentioned so they might get mentioned or show up.)

I did get the meds... but it was anti-depressant meds and another one to like calm me.. but i am too scared to take the anti-depressants. Bc of the possible negative effects.. especially since it can last 1-4 weeks and one of those usual negatives is worsen anxiety which is what im struggling with rn...!!! ugh i hate this. Today my anxiety has been nonexistence atleast, i could only hope and wish for it to go away on its own... those depressant meds are gonna be my last resort i gotta ask my doctor if there is any other way to get anxiety away 😭😭 gonna need to distract myself as much as possible in hopes it goes away.. thats what i did today atleast.
